comments.comment:
Increase in production level, mainly due to turnaround over the months of May and June and part of July in 2020.
The amount of material sent for disposal varies depending on the types of activities undertaken at the plant in the particular year.
No Painting activity in 2020.  250 gal paint used in 2021
There was only one spil with small amount of bitumen emulsion in 2020 which was not completely remediated in 2020.  2021 had a large Dilbit spill that was only 50% cleaned.
